prompts: From 2019 to 2023, the number of flights for the airline changed as follows: in 2019, there were 30,000 flights, decreasing to 25,000 flights in 2020 due to the pandemic. The flights then rose to 28,000 in 2021, 32,000 in 2022, and 38,000 in 2023. The average passenger load factor started at 70% in 2019, dropped to 60% in 2020, and then increased to 65% in 2021, 72% in 2022, and 78% in 2023.
